note: OWNER-CONTROLLED. This is the ONLY place an eligibility verdict may live. No machine decides: entries are recorded only by the owner, by hand or via `npm run ds9:decide` (which validates with the shared production validator and writes exactly what the owner commands, under --write only). Every decision is the owner's editorial call against GROW.md, citing the evidence IDs (from eligibility-evidence.json) it rests on, and pinning the immutable GROW.md version it was judged against. Anything not decided here stays `review` — no regex, species rule, signal, or agent recommendation can move a performance out of review.

schema.rationale: the owner's reasoning against GROW.md (>= 8 chars)
evidence_ids: unique content-addressed ids from that performance's dossier; at least one must be substantive (verified, pinned, non-species)
schema.grow_md_version: immutable pin: GROW.md@<40-hex git sha> or GROW.md@sha256:<64-hex content hash> (never @main)
